default.title: Horizon Tech | Enterprise Software, Cloud, na AI
default.description: Horizon Tech itegura kandi itanga software y'ubudandaji, ibisubizo vya AI, ibikorwaremezo vy'ibicu, hamwe n'ibicuruzwa vya digitale ku migwi ikomeye.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Engineering Systems That Scale
home.description: Porogaramu za sosiyete, AI / ML, ibikorwaremezo vy'ibicu, hamwe n'itangwa rya IoT ku migwi yo kw'isi.

about.title: About Horizon Tech | Ubutumwa bw'ishirahamwe n'umugwi
about.description: Menya ibijanye na Horizon Tech, igikorwa cacu, hamwe n'ingene dutanga inyishu z'ubuhinga buhanitse.

team.title: Umugwi | Horizon Tech Leadership and Experts
team.description: Meet the engineers and leaders building enterprise software and cloud platforms at Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Careers | Kwubaka hamwe na Horizon Tech
careers.description: Explore open roles and grow your career with Horizon Tech's engineering team.

contact.title: Contact Horizon Tech | Gutanguza umugambi wawe
contact.description: Vugana na Horizon Tech kugira tuganire ku mugambi wawe, ivyo ukeneye mu buhinga, hamwe n'ikiringo co gushikiriza.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies | Horizon Tech Results
caseStudies.description: Soma ivyigwa vy'abakiriya hamwe n'ivyavuye mu bushakashatsi bwatanzwe na Horizon Tech mu mahinguriro yose.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Technical insights, delivery lessons, and architecture guidance from Horizon Tech.

education.title: Education | Horizon Tech Learning Resources
education.description: Guides, references, and technical learning resources from Horizon Tech.

support.title: Support | Horizon Tech
support.description: Rondera ibikoresho vy'ubufasha hamwe n'uburyo bwo guhanahana amakuru kuri serivisi za Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Soma amategeko ya Horizon Tech hamwe n'amasezerano yo gukingira amakuru.

terms.title: Terms of Service | Horizon Tech
terms.description: Soma amategeko agenga ubuhinga bwa none ku rubuga rwacu hamwe na serivisi.

profile.title: Profile | Horizon Tech
profile.description: Manage your Horizon Tech profile, settings, and account details.

firstTimeSetup.title: Uburyo bwa mbere bwo gutunganya | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Complete first-time account setup to continue in Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Ijambo ry'ibanga ryibagiwe | Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Subiramwo uburyo bwo kwinjira kuri konte yawe ya Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Andika ijambo ry'ibanga rishasha kuri konte yawe ya Horizon Tech.

confirmEmail.title: Confirm Email | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Confirm your email address to activate your Horizon Tech account.

admin.title: Admin Panel | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Administration workspace for Horizon Tech platform management.

unauthorized.title: Ibirekuriwe | Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: Muri kino gihe, ntimushobora kuronka uru rubuga rwa Horizon Tech.

services.title: Services | Horizon Tech
services.description: Explore Horizon Tech services in software engineering, AI, cloud, DevOps, and digital transformation.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: Raba igeragezwa rya Horizon Tech hamwe n'ibishushanyo muri AI na Applied Engineering.

authCallback.title: Kwiyandikisha | Horizon Tech
authCallback.description: Kwuzuza kwiyandikisha mu mutekano kuri konte yawe ya Horizon Tech.
